name: Martin Short
abstract: Martin Hayter Short (born March 26, 1950) is a Canadian comedian, actor, and writer. He is known as an energetic comedian who gained prominence for his roles in sketch comedy.

concerts.label: The New York Pops 31st Birthday Gala Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: Martin Short: Fame Becomes Me: (Let a Big Black Lady) Stop the Show
Charlie and the Chocolate Factory: Simply Second Nature

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: We just backed up these guys... I was also the music director from ’81 to ’85. You know Eddie Murphy, Joe Piscopo, Martin Short, Billy Crystal era.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Al Chez
about_quotes.evidence: But you know some of the stuff that he had — like Martin Short would come on, okay we’re going to write an original song.
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Chez interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, February 13, 2019
